fr:resource.fr:resource-source: \DiagramSquare { width = 4cm, nw = {\mathopen {}\left (u\times _{u+v}u\right )\mathclose {}}+ {\mathopen {}\left (v\times _{u+v}u\right )\mathclose {}}, sw = u+v, se = w, ne = u, north = \cong , west/style = {embedding}, east/style = {embedding}, nw/style = dotted pullback, }
